mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM global_document
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR document_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO global_document(document_id, title, file_name, file_path, file_type, extracted_text, uploaded_by_id) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{title}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{extractedText}, #{uploadedById})
